skill.name: gws-docs-write
skill.description: Google Docs: Append text to a document.
skill.summary: Append text to Google Docs documents using the official Google Workspace CLI.
skill.author: googleworkspace

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected patterns in SKILL.md but all are FALSE POSITIVES. The file is documentation (markdown) describing CLI usage, not executable code. Referenced paths (../gws-shared/SKILL.md) are documentation links, not path traversal. Bash examples are usage documentation, not command execution. No cryptographic operations present - 'weak algorithm' finding references YAML front matter and table headers. Skill wraps official Google Workspace CLI for document operations.

content.user_title: Append text to Google Docs documents
content.value_statement: Quickly add content to Google Docs without manual editing. This skill uses the official Google Workspace CLI to append text to documents programmatically.
actual_capabilities: Append plain text to the end of Google Docs documents
Specify target document by document ID
Execute write operations with user confirmation
limitations: Only supports plain text insertion at document end
Cannot insert rich formatted content or styling
Document ID must be known beforehand

use_cases.title: Automated Meeting Notes
use_cases.description: Append summarized action items to a shared meeting notes document after each team sync.

use_cases.title: Daily Journal Logging
use_cases.description: Add daily entries to a personal journal document with timestamps and reflections.

use_cases.title: Collaborative Feedback Collection
use_cases.description: Gather feedback from multiple reviewers and append comments to a shared review document.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Text Append
prompt_templates.prompt: Add the text 'Meeting concluded at 3pm' to the Google Doc with ID abc123xyz

prompt_templates.title: Formatted Status Update
prompt_templates.prompt: Append a status update to document ID def456 with the following content: 'Sprint 12 complete. All deliverables shipped. Team velocity: 34 points.'
prompt_templates.scenario: Adding structured updates to project documents

prompt_templates.title: Batch Note Collection
prompt_templates.prompt: Take these three meeting notes and append them sequentially to document ID ghi789, each on a new line
prompt_templates.scenario: Processing multiple text entries for insertion

prompt_templates.title: Conditional Document Update
prompt_templates.prompt: If the user confirms, append the generated summary to the specified Google Doc. Ask for the document ID and summary text first.
prompt_templates.scenario: Safe write operation with explicit user confirmation

output_examples.input: Append 'Project kickoff scheduled for Monday' to document 1a2b3c4d5e
output_examples.output: Successfully appended text to document. The content has been added to the end of the document body.

output_examples.input: Add meeting notes to the team doc
output_examples.output: I need the Google Doc document ID to proceed. Please provide the document ID from the URL (the long string between /d/ and /edit). Also confirm the exact text you want to append.

best_practices: Always confirm write operations with the user before executing
Verify the document ID is valid before attempting to write
Preview the text to be appended so users can review before confirmation
anti_patterns: Appending large blocks of text without breaking into readable sections
Executing write commands without explicit user confirmation
Using this skill for complex formatting that requires the batchUpdate API

faq.question: What authentication is required to use this skill?
faq.answer: Google Workspace OAuth authentication is required. Run gws auth login first to authenticate with your Google account.

faq.question: How do I find my Google Doc document ID?
faq.answer: The document ID is the long string in the URL between /d/ and /edit. For example, in https://docs.google.com/document/d/1a2b3c4d5e/edit, the ID is 1a2b3c4d5e.

faq.question: Can I insert formatted text like bold or headings?
faq.answer: No, this skill only supports plain text insertion. For rich formatting, use the Google Docs batchUpdate API directly.

faq.question: Where in the document does the text get inserted?
faq.answer: Text is always appended to the end of the document body. This skill does not support inserting at arbitrary positions.

faq.question: What happens if the document ID is invalid?
faq.answer: The gws CLI will return an error indicating the document was not found or you lack permission to access it.

faq.question: Is there a character limit for the text I can append?
faq.answer: Google Docs has a 1MB document size limit. For very large text blocks, consider breaking into multiple append operations.
